title: Graces For Children.
content:
What God gives, and what we take,
    'Tis a gift for Christ, His sake:
    Be the meal of beans and peas,
    God be thanked for those and these:
    Have we flesh, or have we fish,
    All are fragments from His dish.
    He His Church save, and the king;
    And our peace here, like a spring,
    Make it ever flourishing.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Graces For Children.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
